judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent followed a reasonable plan but implemented it incorrectly by (1) extracting UC publication numbers with an overly restrictive regex that only matched “US-\d{7,8}-[A-Z]\d” (execute_python var_function-call-10059552934646644970), and (2) parsing the citing assignee from Patents_info using the literal pattern “assignee_harmonized: …” which does not appear in the natural-language summaries, resulting in “UNKNOWN” assignees (execute_python var_function-call-3658823678110237683) and an incorrect final result.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent mis-implemented publication number extraction by stopping at the first hyphen after "pub. number", yielding only country codes (e.g., ["US","TW",…] in var_function-call-9732747833126604290) so the subsequent citation matching found no matches and it incorrectly returned "No assignees."
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After retrieving publicationinfo, the Python step extracted publication numbers with an overly restrictive regex (e.g., missing US-11081687-B2 from the preview), causing the UNIV CALIFORNIA patent list to be empty and yielding no citing assignees, so it returned “No assignees found” instead of performing the CPC title join.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent extracted and joined CPC titles using the full primary CPC subgroup codes (e.g., H01M8/2425) instead of normalizing to the CPC subclass level required by the query, and its regex-based parsing of assignee names from Patents_info miscaptured names (e.g., appending “and has publication no”) and missed many relevant records, producing an incomplete, malformed set of citing assignees with incorrect titles.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent’s contributing steps (query_db var_function-call-12728071522037182114, execute_python var_function-call-12930546105166796875, CPC lookup var_function-call-17688340267481669154) implemented faulty regex that mis-extracted assignees (e.g., "US application") and used granular CPC group codes (e.g., H01L33/22) instead of primary CPC subclasses, yielding only three incorrect assignee–title pairs.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
